task_completion.description: Verify that a new item has been created and its Item Type is set to Webpage.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Juris-M right-hand info pane, the 'Item Type' field should display 'Webpage'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Title is correctly entered as '2023 Merger Guidelines'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Juris-M right-hand info pane, the 'Title' field should exactly read '2023 Merger Guidelines'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Author is 'Federal Trade Commission' and is formatted as a single institutional field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Juris-M right-hand info pane, the 'Author' field should read 'Federal Trade Commission'. Crucially, it must be in a single continuous text box (institutional mode), rather than split into two separate boxes for First and Last names. The toggle button next to the author name should show the single-field icon.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Website Title is correctly entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Juris-M right-hand info pane, the 'Website Title' field should read 'Federal Trade Commission'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the Date is correctly entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Juris-M right-hand info pane, the 'Date' field should read '2023-12-18'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the URL is correctly entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Juris-M right-hand info pane, the 'URL' field should contain 'https://www.ftc.gov/legal-library/browse/cases-proceedings/public-statements/merger-guidelines-2023'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Juris-M graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the Juris-M application window with its standard layout (left pane for collections, center pane for items, right pane for item details), not a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands (like sqlite3) to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing database injection commands. The data entry should be visible in the Juris-M UI fields.

integrity.description: Verify the item is actually saved as an entry in the library.
integrity.visual_evidence: The '2023 Merger Guidelines' item should be visible as a row in the central library pane of Juris-M, confirming it was saved and not just temporarily typed into an unsaved dialog.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected metadata for the Juris-M entry is: Title: '2023 Merger Guidelines', Author: 'Federal Trade Commission', Website Title: 'Federal Trade Commission', Date: '2023-12-18', URL: 'https://www.ftc.gov/legal-library/browse/cases-proceedings/public-statements/merger-guidelines-2023'. In Juris-M/Zotero, an 'institutional' author means the name is entered into a single text field rather than being split into 'First Name' and 'Last Name' fields. This is typically achieved by clicking the small rectangle icon next to the author field to toggle it to single-field mode.
